title: fix(dashboard): fix model permissions reset and account permissions state on edit modal
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: Permission to edit: granted
gist.blurb: Squashed a pesky bug in the dashboard where API key permissions were getting a little forgetful. The edit modal now remembers your settings perfectly, and we've polished up the UI to make managing model access a breeze.
gist.summary: Fixed a UI bug in the dashboard where API key model permissions would reset unexpectedly and account permissions wouldn't persist when reopening the edit modal.
gist.impact: Users can now reliably edit and save their API key permissions without losing their previous selections, thanks to a more intuitive and stable interface.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about fixing 'keys', 'permissions', and 'dashboard UI'. The scene should feature Polly the bee fixing or adjusting a giant golden key or interacting with glowing toggles on a retro control panel, representing the fixed permissions UI.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, using a small wrench to adjust a glowing golden key on a retro control panel. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head watches happily, its screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
